mapper.insert: INSERT INTO otp_auth ( staff_no, otp_hash, expire_at, attempt_count, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{staffNo}, #{otpHash}, #{expireAt}, #{attemptCount}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE otp_auth SET otp_hash = #{otpHash}, expire_at = #{expireAt}, attempt_count = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE staff_no = #{staffNo}
